overview.description: AI-powered recommendation engine and personalized search as a service
overview.description_long: Recombee provides a B2B SaaS recommendation platform trusted by global leaders like The Telegraph, DAZN, and Tripadvisor. The API-first engine uses 100+ proprietary ML models to deliver real-time 1:1 content and product recommendations across video platforms, news sites, e-commerce, real estate, and online marketplaces. The platform also offers personalized search and an analytics/insights module. It supports massive scale — over 30,000 recommendations per second — and gives product teams full control via a custom ReQL query language.
overview.tagline: AI Personalization & Real-Time Recommendations Beyond Expectations

history.origin_story: Founded in 2015 in Prague by six co-founders — several with PhDs from Czech Technical University in Prague — to bring enterprise-grade AI recommendation systems to businesses of all sizes as a scalable SaaS.

key_milestones.event: Partnership with The Telegraph to power AI-driven personalisation for millions of readers
Partnership with DAZN for personalized sports streaming recommendations across 200+ markets
Serving 10,000+ sites and apps with over 30,000 recommendations per second

notable_people.name: Pavel Kordik
notable_people.note: CTU Prague lecturer, 16+ years in predictive modeling and data mining

notable_people.name: Tomas Rehorek
notable_people.note: CTU Prague FIT lecturer, specialist in scalable recommendation algorithms

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Recombee has 100+ proprietary ML models and a custom ReQL query language providing some differentiation, but recommendation APIs are increasingly commoditized by cloud providers (AWS Personalize, Google Recommendations AI). Vertical integrations and 10+ years of behavioral data provide some moat, though not as deep as regulated-domain players.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Personalization and recommendation is a proven, growing market with 10,000+ paying customers across media, video, e-commerce, and marketplace verticals. Enterprise clients like The Telegraph and DAZN signal strong PMF in media/streaming.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Bootstrapped since 2015 with a 51-200 person team and usage-based recurring revenue from 10,000+ customers, suggesting profitable operations without reliance on VC funding. Eleven years of survival without public funding rounds indicates financial sustainability.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: A decade-old, bootstrapped company with a large and diverse customer base, strong academic research backing via CTU Prague, and deep vertical focus in media/streaming. While recommendation commoditization is a medium-term concern, Recombee's scale, proprietary infrastructure, and enterprise contracts provide resilience.

metadata.notes: No public careers page found (/careers and /jobs return 404). No Glassdoor data available via search snippets. No public funding information found — company appears bootstrapped since 2015. Customer count (10,000+) from homepage. Employee count from LinkedIn (51-200, ~47 shown).
